title: Sirāt
tmdbOverview: A man and his son arrive at a rave lost in the mountains of Morocco. They are looking for Marina, their daughter and sister, who disappeared months ago at another rave. Driven by fate, they decide to follow a group of ravers in search of one last party, in hopes Marina will be there.
synopsis: Sirāt (2025) is a drama and thriller film from Spain and France. It holds a solid 7.0 rating on IMDb. It's one of the titles we feature across our 2020s and genre rankings. It carries a R certification (US rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
